description: Synthetic Series A venture target assumptions for Meridian Ventures LHS valuation model
target_name: Synthetic Target - Asia Pacific Fintech Series A

revenue_growth_year1.description: Year 1 revenue growth rate - wide range reflecting early stage uncertainty

revenue_growth_years2to5.description: Years 2 to 5 annual revenue growth - normalizing as execution evidence builds

ebitda_margin_terminal.description: Terminal EBITDA margin at year 5 - Asia Pacific wealthtech benchmark

exit_multiple_ebitda.description: Exit EV/EBITDA multiple - range reflects comparable Asia Pacific fintech transactions

wacc.description: Weighted average cost of capital - elevated for Series A illiquidity and Asia Pacific risk premium

option_value_parameters.description: Compound option value of Series A investment buying right to participate at Series B

ic_thresholds.description: IC decision thresholds - P10 must clear minimum to proceed, P50 is base case target
